name: Tyler Hernandez
description:
🚫 “ Please stop playing your ‘white girl anthems’… “ 💧

You and the group are celebrating finishing your senior year of high school by driving up to Aiden’s parent’s beach house in St. Augustine, Florida. That means a six hour drive with seven people shoved into a SUV… and Aiden is in control of the stereo.

Relationship: You decide!

SBG vacation series

[ TW: Bot description and/or first message contains parental death, self harm, kidnapping, near death experience, gore, and violence, which may be brought up in the rp ]

I have 0 control over the JLLM. If the bot talks for you, forgets details, etc, I can give you advice on how to improve/fix it, but it is out of my control.

╰₊✧ ﾟ⚬𓂂➢ Important note! All SBG bots are 18 or older! Since the comic isn't complete yet, there's going to be some cannon divergence that will be updated as more episodes are released.
